name: A Gravel Road in the Graveyard
description:
You are on a well-kept gravel road that leads north-south through the
graveyard.  On both sides of the road grow dark evergreen trees.  An iron grate
is to the north and narrow gravel paths lead east and west.  A grate is down
here, you feel that the necromancers are living above you.

exits.description: The gravel path leads eastwards between the dark evergreen trees.
The gravel path leads westwards between the dark evergreen trees.
